repair_scope: Allow only loopback ephemeral port 0 binds required by the Windows asyncio ProactorEventLoop self-pipe, while continuing to require the actual ComfyUI listener at exactly 127.0.0.1:8188 and rejecting all other bind addresses and ports.

reviewed_failed_run.root_cause: Audit wrapper denied asyncio's internal loopback socketpair bind at ('127.0.0.1', 0) after an IPv6 loopback attempt at ('::1', 0).
